mapper.sql: node_id, subject_id, parent_node_id, level_code, node_type, planet_no, title, description, sort_order, gate_condition, is_active, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM curriculum_nodes ORDER BY subject_id ASC, level_code ASC, sort_order ASC, node_id ASC

SELECT FROM curriculum_nodes WHERE subject_id = #{subjectId} AND is_active = 1 AND ( level_code > #{levelCode} OR (level_code = #{levelCode} AND sort_order > #{sortOrder}) OR (level_code = #{levelCode} AND sort_order = #{sortOrder} AND node_id > #{nodeId}) ) ORDER BY level_code ASC, sort_order ASC, node_id ASC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO curriculum_nodes (subject_id, parent_node_id, level_code, node_type, planet_no, title, description, sort_order, gate_condition, is_active) VALUES (#{subjectId}, #{parentNodeId}, #{levelCode}, #{nodeType}, #{planetNo}, #{title}, #{description}, #{sortOrder}, #{gateCondition}, #{isActive})
mapper.update: UPDATE curriculum_nodes SET subject_id = #{subjectId}, parent_node_id = #{parentNodeId}, level_code = #{levelCode}, node_type = #{nodeType}, planet_no = #{planetNo}, title = #{title}, description = #{description}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, gate_condition = #{gateCondition}, is_active = #{isActive}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE node_id = #{nodeId}
